Transcrição Completa: Day 23 - O Poder dos Props em Prospecção

 

Conversa

 

[00:00]"What I want you to understand in today's lesson is the power of props."

 

[00:05]"So, when I say that you're going to need your handy-dandy cell phone for taking some selfie videos, you're going to need your handy-dandy list."

 

[00:12]"You can use props around your house. Like, it's so picture frame, right? Watch the type of video that you can shoot with a picture frame."

 

[00:20]"So, we're going to talk to Bob real quick. Hey, what's going on, Bob?"

 

[00:24]"So, I'm sitting here and you know, I'm looking at this picture frame and uh I'm going to be honest with you, it's pretty interesting."

 

[00:31]"It's like there's a lot of famous people unfortunately that are known for this in a bad way. I'm sure you've learned this on CSI or something. It's like the trophy rule."

 

[00:40]"You know, like there's serial killers out there who literally will take an item from people and they'll use it as a trophy to like remind themselves about things."

 

[00:48]"But you know what's what's misunderstood about life and I read out of a book is that people also do that obviously for good things. That's why we have trophies and that's why we give kids trophies."

 

[00:58]"That's why we have, you know, on all levels of life participation awards now, which is kind of an unfortunate thing."

 

[01:04]"And we don't believe in participation awards in my company. And that's actually why I'm holding this picture frame."

 

[01:10]"We actually have a high enough standard where we give out certificates to our internal staff members who do good enough jobs with clients, including our outsourcing partners and our outsourcing teams."

 

[01:21]"And I'm going to be honest with you, man. Bob, I really want to put you in this picture frame. I really want to hang you on my wall of accomplishment."

 

[01:29]"I want to make sure that you have a copy of this, too. But that starts with your ability to set a call with me, man."

 

[01:35]"Don't leave my picture frame empty, man. You see this thing that's in it right now? It's just so generic. I want your face there."

 

[01:42]"Not in a weird way, not in a creepy way, not in a serial killer trophy way. More in a way where I want to have you as a great client."

 

[01:50]"I want to be able to deliver results for you, Bob. Talk soon."

 

[01:54]"Let me know if we can chat in the morning or the afternoon. And you know, should anything come up between now and then other than a nuclear catastrophe, I'm looking forward to the conversation."

 

[02:04]"Talk soon. Bye. Hang up on Bob. Get the call scheduled."

 

[02:09]"Do that. I don't know, way more than a hundred times now because now your momentum should be through the roof."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

CONCEITO PRINCIPAL:

Uso estratégico de props (objetos físicos) em vídeos de prospecção para criar conexões emocionais e memoráveis com prospects

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Técnica do "Picture Frame": usar uma moldura vazia como metáfora visual para motivar o prospect a agendar uma call

Storytelling com props: conectar objetos físicos a narrativas emocionais (troféus, certificados, parede de conquistas)

Abordagem anti-participação: enfatizar altos padrões e reconhecimento por resultados reais

Script de fechamento com urgência emocional: "não deixe minha moldura vazia"

Chamada para ação clara: agendar call manhã ou tarde

 

ESTRUTURA:

Sistema de certificados internos para equipe e parceiros de outsourcing

Parede de conquistas com clientes de sucesso

Padrão de qualidade alto vs "participation awards"

 

VOLUME DE ATIVIDADE:

Meta sugerida: "way more than a hundred times" (mais de 100 repetições do processo)

Foco em momentum crescente através da repetição

 

ELEMENTOS PSICOLÓGICOS:

Uso de analogia negativa (serial killers/troféus) seguida de reframe positivo

Criação de desejo de pertencimento ("wall of accomplishment")

Exclusividade através de padrões elevados

Urgência com humor ("nuclear catastrophe")

 

DURAÇÃO: ~2:15 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional demonstrativo com exemplo prático de script de prospecção usando prop (moldura)
